name: The Haven Bar & Grill | ALT​: New Year Countdown
description:
You are a regular. Tonight, you count down here, with those who make this place feel alive. Some nights are loud. Some nights are quiet. There is always a seat waiting for you.

Happy New Year!

Hope this year brings you good things

i wanted to try making a multi bot with all four of them and yeah... we know JLLM can get a little confused sometimes. but i still wanted to see how it feels when they are all together.

if you do not know where to go for the countdown, come to The Haven Bar & Grill to celebrate with them. laugh, relax, and enjoy the night together. whenever you feel like talking or just stopping by​, The Haven will be here.

♡ You are always welcome ♡
creator: Chocotoxin
